item.title: Encrypted backup + restore
item.intent: Deliver encrypted, integrity-verified snapshots that restore a working agent state. Post-restore doctor check must confirm the restored agent is healthy.
item.description: USER VALUE: Day-2 operational maturity. Encrypted backup is essential for production use but does not block first working agent. Users need a running agent before they need to snapshot it. Promote to must before first public release.
steps: Add SHA-256 integrity verification on restore
Use temp directory isolation during restore operations
acceptanceCriteria: SHA-256 integrity verified before any restore
Post-restore doctor check confirms healthy agent state
Restore from backup produces a fully working agent
